case_title: DAVID JOHNSON VS. BAY AREA FLOOR REFINISHERS LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA FLOOR REFINISHERS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-22-2023 BY DANIEL FLORES. PLAINTIFF DAVID JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAY AREA FLOOR REFINISHERS LLC REPRESENTED BY MARC MANCA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $164.05 SERVED NOV-02-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA FLOOR REFINISHERS LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA FLOOR REFINISHERS LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
